actionCalls.name: Log_Create_CTB_Rule_Success_Message
actionCalls.label: Log Create CTB Rule Success Message

assignments.name: Assign_Benefit_Error_Msg_to_blank
assignments.label: Assign Benefit Error Msg to blank

assignments.description: Assign the error message to a variable, which is then displayed on the screen.
assignments.name: Assign_error_Message_as_Benefit_is_not_populated
assignments.label: Assign error Message as Benefit is not populated

assignments.name: Assign_Worker_HR_Org_Type_Error_Message
assignments.label: Assign Worker HR Org Type Error Message

value.stringValue: Worker HR Org Type is required. Please select a value from the dropdown.
Start Date must be today or a future date or End Date must be the same as or later than the Start Date.

decisions.description: Checks for benefit field is populated for Employee Pooling Recordtype Screen
decisions.name: Is_Benefit_is_populated
decisions.label: Is Benefit is populated

decisions.name: Is_Worker_HR_Org_Type_Filled
decisions.label: Is Worker HR Org Type Filled?

rules.name: Worker_HR_Org_Type_is_Null
rules.label: Worker HR Org Type is Null

Flow.description: Updated Flow as part of US380174 || CTB | Pool foundation: CTB Pooling Rule Object, Record, Form Enhancements (UI/UX) US381273 - Deprecate Unused CTB Rule Object Fields US402125 - CTB | Add Nebula logging on record creation, deletion and updates - CTB Rules US410298 || CTB| Populate the NomineeModificationLimit in the CTB Rules US414739 || CTB | Populate the NomineeReactivationLimit in the Rules US454499 || CTB | Update Grouping Rule record type Conditions
Flow.label: LOY CTB Rule Creation

screens.description: Second Screen for Employee Pooling type
screens.name: Employee_Pooling_Type_Screen_2
screens.label: Employee Pooling Type Screen 2

screens.description: Third Screen for Employee Pooling type
screens.name: Employee_Pooling_Type_Screen_3
screens.label: Employee Pooling Type Screen 3

fields.name: Pool_Type
fields.helpText: This field defines which pooling program the user is defining rules for.

fields.name: Can_Employee_Be_A_Nominee
fields.helpText: This field determines if an employee can be a added as a nominee to a pool of this type.

fields.name: Is_Nominee_Active_Member
fields.helpText: This field determines if the nominee must have an open IHG One Rewards account to be nominated to the pool.

fields.name: Max_Count_of_Nominees
fields.helpText: This field determines how many nominees can be a part of the pool at the same time.

fields.name: Max_Pools_Per_Nominee
fields.helpText: This determines how many pools a single nominee may be a part of at the same time within a pooling program.

fields.name: Select_Chains_to_Include
fields.fieldText:
Select Chains to Include

If no Chains are selected, none will apply to grouping decision

fields.name: Select_Chains_to_Exclude
fields.fieldText:
Select Chains to Exclude

If no Chains are selected, none will apply to grouping decision

fields.name: Select_Brands_to_Include
fields.fieldText:
Select Brands to Include

If no Brands are selected, none will apply to grouping decision

fields.name: Select_Brands_to_Exclude
fields.fieldText:
Select Brands to Exclude

If no Brands are selected, none will apply to grouping decision

value.stringValue: Employee Grouping Rule has been created successfully.

screens.name: Screen_Benefit_Assignment_Step_2_Error_Message
screens.label: Screen Benefit Assignment Step 2 Error Message

screens.name: Screen_Benefit_Assignment_Step_3_Error_Message
screens.label: Screen Benefit Assignment Step 3 Error Message

screens.name: Screen_Worker_HR_Org_Type_Error_Message
screens.label: Screen Worker HR Org Type Error Message

screens.description: Validation message that the user Does not have appropriate access level
screens.name: You_do_not_have_access
screens.label: You do not have access

fields.name: Error_Screen
fields.fieldText: You do not have access to create CTB Rules.

textTemplates.name: LogBrandRetrievalMessage
LogChainRetrievalMessage
LogCreateSuccessCTBRule
